ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "isbn_10" TEXT /* ISBN-10 number of the resource */,
  "isbn_13" TEXT /* ISBN-13 number of the resource */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of resource (e.g., book, article) */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the resource */,
  "copies_available" INTEGER /* Number of copies available in the collection */,
  "copies_in_circulation" INTEGER /* Number of copies currently in circulation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the resource */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the resource */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the resource */,
  "citation_style" TEXT /* Citation style of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource type (e.g., digital, physical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_authors" (
  "resource_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-author association */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_authors_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code of the subject (e.g., MAT101) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_subjects" (
  "resource_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-subject association */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance of the subject to the resource (e.g., 0.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_subjects_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_subjects_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Numerical grade level (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_grades" (
  "resource_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-grade association */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level */,
  "suitability" REAL /* Suitability of the resource for the grade level (e.g., 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_grades_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_grades_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., librarian, teacher, student) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Mathematics, Science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, borrow) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_copies" (
  "copy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each copy */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "copy_number" INTEGER /* Copy number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the copy (e.g., available, lent, lost) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the copy (e.g., new, used, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("copy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_copies_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lending_history" (
  "lending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lending event */,
  "copy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the copy being lent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user borrowing the copy */,
  "borrow_date" TEXT /* Date when the copy was borrowed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the copy was returned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lending (e.g., active, returned, overdue) */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount for the lending (e.g., $5.00) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lending_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lending_history_copy_id FOREIGN KEY ("copy_id") REFERENCES resource_copies ("copy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "resource_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-tag association */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the resource (e.g., keyword, category) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tags_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_reviews" (
  "resource_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-review association */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the resource (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_reviews_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
